heading: Establishment and modification of harbor lines on Potomac and Anacostia Rivers
label: 405 Establishment and modification of harbor lines on Potomac and Anacostia Rivers
text: The provisions of are made applicable to the Potomac and Anacostia Rivers, and after , harbor lines in the District of Columbia, or elsewhere on said rivers, shall be established or modified as therein provided.section 404 of this titleJuly 25, 1912
notes: CodificationSection is from part of section 1 of act , popularly known as the “Rivers and Harbors Appropriation Act of 1912”.July 25, 1912
